---
mode: ask
model: GPT-5.3-Codex
description: Create or improve a home page section with clear content hierarchy and responsive behavior.
---

Build or refactor a section on the Home page.

Inputs:

- Section name:
- Objective:
- Required copy points:
- CTA text/link:
- Constraints:

Requirements:

- Use existing UI primitives and section patterns in this repository.
- Keep it accessible and responsive.
- Minimize unrelated refactors.
- Run lint and build after implementation.

Return:

1. What changed.
2. Files touched.
3. Validation run results.
4. Any follow-up suggestions.
